correctness_policy: Every non-OOM candidate was checked on both sliding layer 12 and full layer 13 with real checkpoint weights; all listed performance candidates passed the accepted PCC gates.

decode_candidates.name: compact_45_core_subblock2
decode_candidates.decision: reject: slower for both layer kinds

decode_candidates.name: selected_geometry_dram_output
decode_candidates.decision: reject: slower for both layer kinds

decode_candidates.name: swapped_k_blocks
decode_candidates.decision: reject: slower for both layer kinds

prefill_candidates.name: compact_45_core_subblock2
prefill_candidates.decision: reject: short gain loses coherently at S=128

prefill_candidates.name: k90
prefill_candidates.decision: reject: slower for both lengths and layer kinds

prefill_candidates.name: unbounded_l1_output
prefill_candidates.m64_failure: 94,371,840-byte allocation; 858,112 bytes/bank requested while only 353,472-byte largest free block remained
prefill_candidates.m128_failure: 188,743,680-byte allocation; 1,716,224 bytes/bank requested versus 1,461,504-byte bank size
prefill_candidates.decision: adapt into tile-bounded placement rather than reject

prefill_candidates.name: selected_tile_bounded_l1
prefill_candidates.output_memory: L1 for internally padded M<=32; DRAM for M>=64
prefill_candidates.decision: selected: captures the short-prefill gain without reducing valid length or context support

subblock_legality: The selected 90-core mapping produces one output tile per core, so subblock_w>1 is illegal there. The legal subblock_w=2 control was measured with 45 output cores.
